zh.lifeSummary: 當James Hope Covey Jr.於1715年6月24日出生在美國羅得島華盛頓維斯特利時，他的父親James Hope Covey Sr28歲，母親Sarah Lanphere28歲。他於1738年1月21日與Mary Lamphere在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德金斯維斯特利結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他於1781年住在美國紐約州普特南肯特。他去世於1787年7月16日在美國羅得島華盛頓維斯特利享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Hope Covey Jr.于1715年6月24日出生在美国罗德岛州華盛頓維斯特利时，他的父亲James Hope Covey Sr28岁，母亲Sarah Lanphere28岁。他于1738年1月21日与Mary Lamphere在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德金斯維斯特利结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他于1781年住在美国纽约州普特南肯特。他去世于1787年7月16日在美国罗德岛州華盛頓維斯特利享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: Covey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: shortened form of MacCovey, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cobhthaigh (see Coffey ).

English: unexplained. Covey is used of ‘pantry’ in the early modern period and covey ‘little chap’ (a diminutive of cove, Middle English cof ‘bold, eager, courageous’; see Cove ) in the early nineteenth century, but there is no evidence to confirm either as the source for the surname.

variants.name: Coffey
meanings: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Cathbhadha ‘descendant of Cathbhadh’, a byname meaning ‘battle tent’, Ó Cathbhuadhaigh ‘descendant of Cathbhuadhach’ (‘battle victorious’), or Ó Cathmhogha ‘descendant of Cathmhugh’ (‘battle slave’).
shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Cobhthaigh ‘descendant of Cobhthach’, a byname meaning ‘victorious’.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

nameMeanings.name: Hope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the vocabulary word (Old English hopa) denoting the quality, in particular the Christian quality of expectation in the resurrection and in eternal life. The name was created by the Puritans and has been one of their most successful coinages.

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

en.lifeSummary: When James Hope Covey Jr. was born on 24 June 1715, in Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, United States, his father, James Hope Covey Sr, was 28 and his mother, Sarah Lanphere, was 28. He married Mary Lamphere on 21 January 1738, in Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 7 daughters. He lived in Kent, Putnam, New York, United States in 1781. He died on 16 July 1787, in Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, United States, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Hope Covey Jr. est né le 24 juin 1715, à Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, États-Unis, son père, James Hope Covey Sr, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Sarah Lanphere, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Mary Lamphere le 21 janvier 1738, à Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 7 filles. Il a vécu à Kent, Putnam, New York, États-Unis en 1781. Il est décédé le 16 juillet 1787, à Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, États-Unis, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als James Hope Covey Jr. am 24. Juni 1715 in Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Hope Covey Sr 28 und seine Mutter Sarah Lanphere 28. Er hat am 21. Januar 1738 in Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British Colonial America Mary Lamphere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 11 Söhne und 7 Töchter. 1781 hat er in Kent, Putnam, New York, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 16. Juli 1787 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Hope Covey Jr. è nato il il 24 giugno 1715 nel Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, James Hope Covey Sr, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Sarah Lanphere, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Mary Lamphere il 21 gennaio 1738, nel Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 11 figli e 7 figlie. Vissuto a Kent, Putnam, New York, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1781. Morì il 16 luglio 1787, nel Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: James Hope Covey Jr.が1715年6月24日にアメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州ワシュイントンウエステルリーで生まれた時，父James Hope Covey Srは28歳，母Sarah Lanphereは28歳であった。1738年1月21日にイギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドキングズウエステルリーでMary Lamphereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1781年にはアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州プウトナムケントに住んでいた。彼は1787年7月16日にアメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州ワシュイントンウエステルリーで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: James Hope Covey Jr.(이)가 1715년 6월 24일 미국 로드아일랜드 주 와신그턴 웨스털리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Hope Covey Sr(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Lanphere(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1738년 1월 21일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 킨그스 웨스털리에서 Mary Lamphere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 1781년도에 미국 뉴욕 주 풋남 켄트에서 살았다. 그는 1787년 7월 16일 미국 로드아일랜드 주 와신그턴 웨스털리에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Hope Covey Jr. nasceu em 24 de junho de 1715, em Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, James Hope Covey Sr, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Lanphere, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Lamphere em 21 de janeiro de 1738, em Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 11 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele viveu em Kent, Putnam, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América em 1781. Ele faleceu em 16 de julho de 1787, em Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Hope Covey Jr. родился 24 июня 1715 г. в местности вестирли, вашингтон, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени James Hope Covey Sr было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Lanphere, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Lamphere 21 января 1738 г. в местности вестирли, кингс, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он жил в местности кэнт, путнам, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты в 1781 году. Он умер 16 июля 1787 г. в местности вестирли, вашингтон, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando James Hope Covey Jr. nació el 24 de junio de 1715, en Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos, su papá, James Hope Covey Sr, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Sarah Lanphere, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Mary Lamphere el 21 de enero de 1738, en Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 11 hijos y 7 hijas. Vivió en Kent, Putnam, Nueva York, Estados Unidos en 1781. Murió el 16 de julio de 1787, en Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 72 años.
